HPCell 0.5.0
  • Reference

    Cell Type Annotation Transfer

    annotation_label_transfer.Rd

    annotation_label_transfer utilizes SingleR for cell-type identification using reference datasets (Blueprint and Monaco Immune data). It can also perform cell type labeling using Azimuth when a reference is provided.

    annotation_label_transfer(
  input_read_RNA_assay,
  empty_droplets_tbl = NULL,
  reference_azimuth = NULL,
  assay = NULL,
  feature_nomenclature
)

    Arguments

    input_read_RNA_assay

    A SingleCellExperiment or Seurat object containing RNA assay data.

    empty_droplets_tbl

    A tibble identifying empty droplets (output of empty_droplet_id()). NULL skips filtering.

    reference_azimuth

    Optional Azimuth reference object or reference name string. NULL uses the default BlueprintEncode + Monaco immune references. Requires the Azimuth package (GitHub-only: remotes::install_github("satijalab/azimuth@master")).

    assay

    Name of the assay to use. NULL uses the first assay.

    feature_nomenclature

    Character scalar indicating gene identifier type. One of "symbol" or "ensembl".

    Value

    A tibble with cell-type annotation data.

    Contents

    Developed by Stefano Mangiola, Jiayi Si.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
